name: Mattie's Jam Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Nuts (such as pecans or walnuts)
Figs and dates, chopped, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, sour milk, flour, butter, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and eggs until well combined.
2. Fold in the raisins, nuts, figs, and dates (if using) until evenly distributed.
3. Gently stir in the 2 cups of jam.
4. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. If desired, serve with caramel icing.
